<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>NL Diagnóstica — Editais de Licitação</title>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
<script src="https://unpkg.com/lucide@latest"></script>
<style>
  :root{
    /* Paleta da marca NL Diagnóstica (laranja institucional) */
    --bg:#f4f6f9; --panel:#ffffff; --card:#ffffff; --line:#e6eaf0;
    --txt:#1f2a37; --muted:#6b7785;
    --pri:#f7941e; --pri2:#e07c12; --pri-soft:#fff3e3;
    --brand1:#b85c0a; --brand2:#8f4205;  /* gradiente da barra/marca (escuro p/ contraste) */
    --ok:#16a34a; --okbg:#e8f7ee; --no:#dc2626; --nobg:#fdeaea;
    --warn:#d97706; --chip:#f3f5f8;
    --shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,.04),0 4px 16px rgba(16,24,40,.06);
    --sidebar-width:248px;
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box}
  body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui,Segoe UI,Roboto,Arial,sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--txt);font-size:14px}
  a{color:var(--pri2)}
  button{font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;border:none;border-radius:9px;padding:8px 14px;font-weight:600;transition:background .15s,color .15s,box-shadow .15s,transform .08s,filter .15s}
  button:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
  button:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;filter:grayscale(.2);box-shadow:none}
  button:disabled:active{transform:none}
  .btn-pri{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pri),var(--pri2));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(224,124,18,.35)} .btn-pri:hover{filter:brightness(1.06);box-shadow:0 3px 10px rgba(224,124,18,.32)}
  .btn-ok{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1fb955,var(--ok));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(22,163,74,.3)} .btn-ok:hover{filter:brightness(1.05)}
  .btn-no{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ef4444,var(--no));color:#fff;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(220,38,38,.3)} .btn-no:hover{filter:brightness(1.05)}
  .btn-ghost{background:#fff;color:var(--txt);border:1px solid var(--line)} .btn-ghost:hover{background:var(--pri-soft);color:var(--pri2);border-color:var(--pri)}
  .btn-ghost:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed;background:#fff;color:var(--muted);border-color:var(--line)}
  input,select,textarea{background:#fff;color:var(--txt);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px;font-family:inherit;font-size:14px;width:100%}
  input:focus,select:focus,textarea:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--pri);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--pri-soft)}
  .hidden{display:none!important}
  /* marca / logo */
  .logo-mark{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
  .logo-mark img{height:34px;display:block}
  .logo-mark .wm{display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:1}
  .logo-mark .wm b{font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.5px;font-size:17px}
  .logo-mark .wm small{font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:2px;opacity:.85;text-transform:uppercase}
  /* login */
  #login{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff7ee 0%,#f4f6f9 55%)}
  .login-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;width:380px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
  .login-head{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--brand1),var(--brand2));padding:26px 28px;color:#fff}
  .login-head img{height:46px;display:block;margin-bottom:10px;filter:drop-shadow(0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.35))}
  .login-head h1{font-size:18px;margin:0;font-weight:700;text-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.25)}
  .login-head p{margin:2px 0 0;font-size:12.5px;opacity:1;color:#ffe9d2}
  .login-body{padding:26px 28px}
  .login-body label{display:block;margin:12px 0 4px;color:var(--muted);font-size:12px}
  .err{color:#b91c1c;font-size:13px;margin-top:10px;min-height:18px}
  /* ===== app shell: topbar + sidebar (estilo Rubbercity) ===== */
  #app{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100vh;overflow:hidden}
  .topbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;padding:0 18px;height:60px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--brand1),var(--brand2));color:#fff;z-index:30;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(243,113,33,.25);flex-shrink:0}
  .topbar .logo-mark .wm{color:#fff}
  .topbar .right{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}
  .role-pill{font-size:11px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.18);color:#fff}
  .toggle-sidebar-btn{background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.4);color:#fff;width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;padding:0}
  .toggle-sidebar-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.28)}
  .toggle-sidebar-btn svg{width:18px;height:18px}

  .main-grid{display:grid;flex:1;overflow:hidden;grid-template-columns:var(--sidebar-width) 1fr;transition:grid-template-columns .3s ease;position:relative}
  .main-grid.sidebar-closed{grid-template-columns:0 1fr}

  #sidebar{background:var(--card);border-right:2px solid var(--pri);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden}
  #sidebar-header{padding:16px 16px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line)}
  #sidebar-header .sb-title{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);font-weight:700}
  .sidebar-nav{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px}
  .sidebar-nav button{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;width:100%;text-align:left;justify-content:flex-start;padding:11px 12px;border-radius:8px;background:transparent;color:var(--txt);font-weight:600;font-size:13.5px;border-left:3px solid transparent}
  .sidebar-nav button svg{width:17px;height:17px;color:var(--muted);flex-shrink:0}
  .sidebar-nav button:hover{background:var(--chip)}
  .sidebar-nav button.active{background:var(--pri-soft);color:var(--pri2);border-left-color:var(--pri)}
  .sidebar-nav button.active svg{color:var(--pri2)}

  .sidebar-footer{padding:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);background:#fafbfd;margin-top:auto}
  .user-profile{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:8px;background:var(--chip);border-radius:8px}
  .user-avatar{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--brand1),var(--brand2));color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0}
  .user-info{flex:1;overflow:hidden}
  .user-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--txt);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
  .user-role{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
  .footer-actions{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:10px}
  .footer-btn{flex:1;padding:9px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:#fff;color:var(--txt);border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:7px;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600}
  .footer-btn svg{width:14px;height:14px}
  .footer-btn:hover{background:var(--pri-soft);color:var(--pri2);border-color:var(--pri)}

  #content{overflow:auto;padding:22px 20px}
  #content > section{max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto}

  .sidebar-backdrop{display:none}
  @media (max-width:768px){
    .main-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    .main-grid.sidebar-closed{grid-template-columns:1fr}
    #sidebar{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;width:260px;height:100%;z-index:200;box-shadow:2px 0 12px rgba(16,24,40,.25);transition:transform .3s ease;transform:translateX(-100%)}
    .main-grid:not(.sidebar-closed) #sidebar{transform:translateX(0)}
    .sidebar-backdrop{display:none;position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(16,24,40,.5);z-index:199;pointer-events:none}
    .main-grid:not(.sidebar-closed) .sidebar-backdrop{display:block;pointer-events:auto}
  }
  h2{color:var(--txt)}
  /* cabeçalho de página padrão */
  .page-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:13px;margin-bottom:6px}
  .page-head h2{margin:0;font-size:20px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:-.3px}
  .page-head .ph-icon{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:11px;background:var(--pri-soft);color:var(--pri2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid #ffe2c2}
  .page-head .ph-icon svg{width:20px;height:20px}
  .page-sub{color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;margin:2px 0 20px;max-width:780px;line-height:1.5}
  .cards{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:14px;margin-bottom:22px}
  .stat{position:relative;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:16px 16px 15px 19px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);overflow:hidden;transition:transform .15s ease,box-shadow .15s ease}
  .stat::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:4px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--pri),var(--pri2))}
  .stat:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(16,24,40,.10)}
  .stat .n{font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:var(--txt);line-height:1} .stat .l{color:var(--muted);font-size:11px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.6px;margin-top:6px;font-weight:600}
  .stat.clickable{cursor:pointer}
  .stat.active{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px var(--pri),var(--shadow)}
  .stat.s-aceitar::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#22c55e,#15803d)}
  .stat.s-recusar::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ef4444,#b91c1c)}
  .stat.s-analisar::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#f59e0b,#d97706)}
  .stat.s-aceitos::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#16a34a,#166534)}
  .stat.s-recusados::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#dc2626,#991b1b)}
  .stat.s-neutro::before{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#94a3b8,#64748b)}
  .toolbar{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:end;margin-bottom:16px;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:14px 16px;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
  .toolbar .f{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px}
  .toolbar .f label{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
  .toolbar .f.search{flex:1;min-width:200px}
  table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow)}
  th,td{padding:12px 14px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);font-size:13px;vertical-align:top}
  th{background:#f8fafc;color:var(--muted);font-size:10.5px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.7px;font-weight:700}
  tbody tr{transition:background .12s ease}
  tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none}
  tbody tr:hover td{background:var(--pri-soft)}
  .tag{display:inline-block;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid var(--line);white-space:nowrap}
  .tag.novo{color:#2563eb;border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff}
  .tag.sug_a{color:#15803d;border-color:#bbf7d0;background:#f0fdf4}
  .tag.sug_r{color:#b91c1c;border-color:#fecaca;background:#fef2f2}
  .tag.aceito{background:var(--okbg);color:#15803d;border-color:#bbf7d0}
  .tag.recusado{background:var(--nobg);color:#b91c1c;border-color:#fecaca}
  .tag.analisando{color:var(--warn);border-color:#fde68a;background:#fffbeb}
  .modo{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
  .score-bar{height:7px;background:var(--chip);border-radius:999px;overflow:hidden;width:80px}
  .score-bar i{display:block;height:100%;border-radius:999px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--pri),var(--pri2));transition:width .4s ease}
  .row-actions{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .row-actions button{padding:5px 11px;font-size:12px}
  /* linha clicável + resumo da IA */
  tr.edital-row{cursor:pointer}
  tr.edital-row.has-ai td{border-bottom:none}
  tr.ai-row{cursor:pointer}
  tr.ai-row td{padding-top:0;padding-bottom:12px}
  tr.ai-row:hover td,tr.edital-row.has-ai:hover td{background:var(--pri-soft)}
  .ai-callout{display:flex;gap:9px;align-items:flex-start;font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.45;border-radius:10px;padding:9px 12px;border:1px solid}
  .ai-callout .ai-ico{flex:0 0 auto;font-size:13px}
  .ai-callout.ok{background:#f0fdf4;border-color:#bbf7d0;color:#15603a}
  .ai-callout.warn{background:#fffbeb;border-color:#fde68a;color:#92600a}
  .ai-callout strong{font-weight:700}
  .pager{display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:14px;color:var(--muted);font-size:13px}
  /* modal */
  .modal-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(16,24,40,.45);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:50;padding:20px}
  .modal{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;max-width:900px;width:100%;max-height:90vh;overflow:auto;box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(16,24,40,.25)}
  .modal header{position:sticky;top:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--brand1),var(--brand2));color:#fff;height:auto;padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;box-shadow:none}
  .modal .body{padding:20px}
  .kv{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px}
  .kv div{background:var(--chip);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 10px}
  /* toast */
  #toastRoot{position:fixed;bottom:22px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:200;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;align-items:center;pointer-events:none}
  .toast{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;min-width:240px;max-width:420px;background:var(--card);color:var(--txt);border:1px solid var(--line);border-left:4px solid var(--pri);padding:12px 16px;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(16,24,40,.18);font-size:13.5px;font-weight:500;pointer-events:auto;opacity:0;transform:translateY(12px);transition:opacity .25s ease,transform .25s ease}
  .toast.show{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
  .toast .ti{flex:0 0 auto;width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:50%;color:#fff;font-size:12px;font-weight:700}
  .toast.info{border-left-color:var(--pri)} .toast.info .ti{background:var(--pri)}
  .toast.success{border-left-color:var(--ok)} .toast.success .ti{background:var(--ok)}
  .toast.error{border-left-color:var(--no)} .toast.error .ti{background:var(--no)}
  .toast .tx{flex:1;line-height:1.4}
  /* confirm dialog */
  .modal.confirm{max-width:420px}
  .modal.confirm .body{padding:22px}
  .confirm-ico{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;margin:0 auto 14px}
  .confirm-ico.danger{background:var(--nobg);color:var(--no)}
  .confirm-ico.ask{background:var(--pri-soft);color:var(--pri2)}
  .confirm-msg{text-align:center;font-size:15px;line-height:1.5;color:var(--txt);margin-bottom:20px}
  .confirm-actions{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center}
  .confirm-actions button{min-width:110px}
  .kv .k{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)} .kv .v{font-weight:600}
  .close{margin-left:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;font-size:18px;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:8px}
  .close:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.35)}
  /* chat — widget flutuante */
  #chatFab{position:fixed;right:22px;bottom:22px;z-index:120;width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pri),var(--pri2));color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(224,124,18,.45);border:none;padding:0}
  #chatFab svg{width:24px;height:24px}
  #chatFab:hover{filter:brightness(1.06);transform:translateY(-2px)}
  #chatFab.hidden{display:none!important}
  #chatPanel{position:fixed;right:22px;bottom:22px;z-index:121;width:400px;max-width:calc(100vw - 28px);height:620px;max-height:calc(100vh - 100px);background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;box-shadow:0 18px 50px rgba(16,24,40,.28);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;animation:cpIn .18s ease}
  @keyframes cpIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
  .cp-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:12px 14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--brand1),var(--brand2));color:#fff;flex-shrink:0}
  .cp-head svg{width:18px;height:18px}
  .cp-head strong{font-size:14px}
  .cp-ctx{font-size:10.5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:999px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:130px}
  .cp-head .cp-icon{margin-left:0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.16);color:#fff;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0;flex-shrink:0}
  .cp-head .cp-icon:first-of-type{margin-left:auto}
  .cp-head .cp-icon:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.3)}
  .cp-head .cp-icon svg{width:15px;height:15px}
  .cp-sessions{flex-shrink:0;max-height:160px;overflow:auto;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);background:#fafbfd;padding:8px}
  .cp-sessions .s{padding:8px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12.5px;color:var(--muted);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
  .cp-sessions .s:hover,.cp-sessions .s.active{background:var(--pri-soft);color:var(--pri2)}
  #chatPanel .msgs{flex:1;overflow:auto;padding:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px}
  #chatPanel .composer{display:flex;gap:8px;padding:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);flex-shrink:0}
  #chatPanel .composer textarea{resize:none;height:44px}
  .cp-attach{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0;width:44px;flex-shrink:0;color:var(--muted)}
  .cp-attach svg{width:18px;height:18px}
  .cp-attach:hover{color:var(--pri2)}
  /* ações rápidas (placeholder do chat) */
  .cp-quick{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;margin-top:14px}
  .cp-quick .qa-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);text-align:center}
  .cp-quick .qa-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;width:100%;text-align:left;justify-content:flex-start;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;background:#fff;color:var(--txt);font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600}
  .cp-quick .qa-btn svg{width:15px;height:15px;color:var(--pri2);flex-shrink:0}
  .cp-quick .qa-btn:hover{background:var(--pri-soft);border-color:var(--pri);color:var(--pri2)}
  #chatPanel.hidden{display:none!important}
  /* estado expandido (quase tela cheia) */
  #chatPanel.expanded{width:min(960px,calc(100vw - 44px));height:calc(100vh - 60px);right:22px;bottom:22px}
  #chatPanel.expanded .msg{max-width:75%}
  @media (max-width:768px){
    #chatPanel{right:10px;bottom:10px;width:calc(100vw - 20px);height:calc(100vh - 90px)}
    #chatPanel.expanded{width:calc(100vw - 20px);height:calc(100vh - 70px);right:10px;bottom:10px}
    #chatFab{right:16px;bottom:16px}
  }
  .msg{max-width:85%;padding:11px 15px;border-radius:14px;line-height:1.55;box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(16,24,40,.06)}
  .msg.u{align-self:flex-end;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--pri),var(--pri2));color:#fff;border-bottom-right-radius:4px;white-space:pre-wrap}
  .msg.a{align-self:flex-start;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-bottom-left-radius:4px;overflow-x:auto}
  /* markdown renderizado (respostas do assistente) */
  .msg.a > :first-child{margin-top:0}
  .msg.a > :last-child{margin-bottom:0}
  .msg.a p{margin:0 0 8px}
  .msg.a h1,.msg.a h2,.msg.a h3,.msg.a h4{margin:12px 0 6px;line-height:1.25;font-weight:700}
  .msg.a h1{font-size:17px} .msg.a h2{font-size:15.5px} .msg.a h3{font-size:14px} .msg.a h4{font-size:13px}
  .msg.a ul,.msg.a ol{margin:4px 0 8px;padding-left:20px}
  .msg.a li{margin:2px 0}
  .msg.a a{color:var(--pri2);font-weight:600;text-decoration:none}
  .msg.a a:hover{text-decoration:underline}
  .msg.a code{background:var(--chip);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:5px;padding:1px 5px;font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,Consolas,monospace;font-size:12.5px}
  .msg.a pre{background:#0f172a;color:#e2e8f0;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;overflow-x:auto;margin:8px 0}
  .msg.a pre code{background:none;border:0;padding:0;color:inherit;font-size:12.5px}
  .msg.a blockquote{margin:8px 0;padding:4px 12px;border-left:3px solid var(--pri);background:var(--pri-soft);border-radius:0 8px 8px 0;color:var(--txt)}
  .msg.a hr{border:0;border-top:1px solid var(--line);margin:12px 0}

<script>
/* ============ CONFIG ============ */
const CONFIG = {
  SUPABASE_URL:  "https://longflatworm-supabase.cloudfy.live",
  SUPABASE_ANON_KEY: "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJyb2xlIjoiYW5vbiIsImlzcyI6InN1cGFiYXNlIiwiaWF0IjoxNzczNjY1NzE2LCJleHAiOjE4MDUyMDE3MTZ9.nM55mAkSiyvvaIoUACEw4pY4GSJVfvrMX7b1q5JVwyg",
  // base dos webhooks n8n, ex.: https://seu-n8n.cloudfy.live/webhook
  N8N_BASE: "https://longflatworm-n8n.cloudfy.live/webhook"
};
const COMPANY = "nldiagnostica";
const MOTIVOS_EFFECTI = ["FALTA_CAPACIDADE_TECNICA","LOCALIDADE_ENTREGA","VALOR_ESTIMADO_BAIXO","DOCUMENTACAO_INSUFICIENTE","PRAZO_ENTREGA_CURTO","OUTROS"];

/* ============ logo da marca (embutido) ============ */
const LOGO = "data:image/png;base64,";
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>{
  const a=document.getElementById('logoLogin'); if(a) a.src=LOGO;
  const b=document.getElementById('logoHeader'); if(b) b.src=LOGO;
  if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
});

/* ============ resilient storage (iframe/webhook safe) ============ */
(function(){
  try { window.localStorage.setItem('__t','1'); window.localStorage.removeItem('__t'); }
  catch(e){
    const mem={}; const fake={getItem:k=>k in mem?mem[k]:null,setItem:(k,v)=>{mem[k]=String(v)},removeItem:k=>{delete mem[k]},clear:()=>{for(const k in mem)delete mem[k]},key:i=>Object.keys(mem)[i]||null,get length(){return Object.keys(mem).length}};
    try{Object.defineProperty(window,'localStorage',{value:fake,configurable:true})}catch(_){}
  }
  if(!('locks' in navigator)){ try{Object.defineProperty(navigator,'locks',{value:{request:async(n,o,cb)=>cb?cb():undefined,query:async()=>({held:[],pending:[]})},configurable:true})}catch(_){}}
})();

const sb = supabase.createClient(CONFIG.SUPABASE_URL, CONFIG.SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, {
  auth:{ storageKey:'nldiag-auth', persistSession:true, autoRefreshToken:true, detectSessionInUrl:false }
});

/* ============ state ============ */
let ME = null;           // { id, email, full_name, role }
let isAdmin = false;
let page = 0; const PAGE_SIZE = 25; let totalCount = 0;
let curSession = null;
let currentView = 'editais';

const $ = s => document.querySelector(s);
const el = (t,c,h)=>{const e=document.createElement(t);if(c)e.className=c;if(h!=null)e.innerHTML=h;return e;};
const esc = s => (s==null?'':String(s)).replace(/[&<>"]/g,c=>({'&':'&','<':'<','>':'>','"':'"'}[c]));
const fmtDate = s => { if(!s) return '—'; const d=new Date(s); return isNaN(d)?'—':d.toLocaleDateString('pt-BR'); };
const fmtMoney = v => { const n=Number(v); return (!isFinite(n)||n<=0)?'—':n.toLocaleString('pt-BR',{style:'currency',currency:'BRL'}); };
// parse defensivo: webhooks n8n podem responder 200 com corpo vazio quando não há dados
const safeJson = async r => { const t = await r.text(); if(!t || !t.trim()) return null; try{ return JSON.parse(t); }catch(_){ return null; } };
const stripCtx = s => (s==null?'':String(s)).replace(/^\s*\[CONTEXTO[^\]]*\]\s*/i,'');
// remove marcação HTML (ex.: <em>, <mark>) que vem dos portais de busca e normaliza espaços
const stripTags = s => (s==null?'':String(s)).replace(/<\/?[^>]+>/g,'').replace(/ /gi,' ').replace(/&/gi,'&').replace(/</gi,'<').replace(/>/gi,'>').replace(/"/gi,'"').replace(/&#0?39;|'/gi,"'").replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();
const txt = s => esc(stripTags(s));
const mdLite = s => esc(s).replace(/\*\*(.+?)\*\*/g,'<strong>$1</strong>').replace(/\n/g,'<br>'); // legado (mantido p/ compat.)
/* ---- renderizador de markdown (respostas do assistente) ---- */
// inline: escapa HTML primeiro, depois aplica code/bold/italic/links com segurança
function mdInline(s){
  let h = esc(s);
  // `código`
  h = h.replace(/`([^`]+)`/g, (m,c)=>`<code>${c}</code>`);
  // links [texto](url) — só http(s)/mailto
  h = h.replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\((https?:\/\/[^\s)]+|mailto:[^\s)]+)\)/g,
    (m,t,u)=>`<a href="${u}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">${t}</a>`);
  // **negrito** e __negrito__
  h = h.replace(/\*\*([^*]+)\*\*/g,'<strong>$1</strong>').replace(/__([^_]+)__/g,'<strong>$1</strong>');
  // *itálico* e _itálico_
  h = h.replace(/(^|[^*])\*([^*\n]+)\*(?!\*)/g,'$1<em>$2</em>').replace(/(^|[^_])_([^_\n]+)_(?!_)/g,'$1<em>$2</em>');
  return h;
}
function mdTableRow(line){
  let s = line.trim().replace(/^\|/,'').replace(/\|$/,'');
  return s.split('|').map(c=>c.trim());
}
function mdRender(src){
  if(src==null) return '';
  const lines = String(src).replace(/\r\n/g,'\n').split('\n');
  let html='', i=0;
  const flushList = (()=>{}); // placeholder
  while(i < lines.length){
    let line = lines[i];
    // bloco de código cercado ```
    const fence = line.match(/^\s*```(\w*)\s*$/);
    if(fence){
      let code=[]; i++;
      while(i<lines.length && !/^\s*```\s*$/.test(lines[i])){ code.push(lines[i]); i++; }
      i++; // pula fence de fechamento
      html += `<pre><code>${esc(code.join('\n'))}</code></pre>`;
      continue;
    }
    // tabela GFM: linha com | seguida de linha separadora |---|
    if(/\|/.test(line) && i+1<lines.length && /^\s*\|?\s*:?-+/.test(lines[i+1]) && /\|/.test(lines[i+1])){
      const head = mdTableRow(line);
      i += 2; // pula cabeçalho e separador
      let body=[];
      while(i<lines.length && /\|/.test(lines[i]) && lines[i].trim()!==''){ body.push(mdTableRow(lines[i])); i++; }
      html += '<table><thead><tr>'+head.map(c=>`<th>${mdInline(c)}</th>`).join('')+'</tr></thead><tbody>'
        + body.map(r=>'<tr>'+head.map((_,k)=>`<td>${mdInline(r[k]||'')}</td>`).join('')+'</tr>').join('')
        + '</tbody></table>';
      continue;
    }
    // título
    const hm = line.match(/^(#{1,4})\s+(.*)$/);
    if(hm){ const lvl=hm[1].length; html += `<h${lvl}>${mdInline(hm[2])}</h${lvl}>`; i++; continue; }
    // linha horizontal
    if(/^\s*(---|\*\*\*|___)\s*$/.test(line)){ html += '<hr>'; i++; continue; }
    // citação
    if(/^\s*>\s?/.test(line)){
      let q=[];
      while(i<lines.length && /^\s*>\s?/.test(lines[i])){ q.push(lines[i].replace(/^\s*>\s?/,'')); i++; }
      html += `<blockquote>${mdInline(q.join('\n')).replace(/\n/g,'<br>')}</blockquote>`;
      continue;
    }
    // lista não-ordenada
    if(/^\s*[-*+]\s+/.test(line)){
      let items=[];
      while(i<lines.length && /^\s*[-*+]\s+/.test(lines[i])){ items.push(lines[i].replace(/^\s*[-*+]\s+/,'')); i++; }
      html += '<ul>'+items.map(t=>`<li>${mdInline(t)}</li>`).join('')+'</ul>';
      continue;
    }
    // lista ordenada
    if(/^\s*\d+[.)]\s+/.test(line)){
      let items=[];
      while(i<lines.length && /^\s*\d+[.)]\s+/.test(lines[i])){ items.push(lines[i].replace(/^\s*\d+[.)]\s+/,'')); i++; }
      html += '<ol>'+items.map(t=>`<li>${mdInline(t)}</li>`).join('')+'</ol>';
      continue;
    }
    // linha em branco
    if(line.trim()===''){ i++; continue; }
    // parágrafo (agrupa linhas consecutivas)
    let para=[];
    while(i<lines.length && lines[i].trim()!=='' && !/^\s*(#{1,4}\s|[-*+]\s|\d+[.)]\s|>\s?|```)/.test(lines[i])
          && !(/\|/.test(lines[i]) && i+1<lines.length && /^\s*\|?\s*:?-+/.test(lines[i+1]))){
      para.push(lines[i]); i++;
    }
    html += `<p>${mdInline(para.join('\n')).replace(/\n/g,'<br>')}</p>`;
  }
  return html;
}

/* ============ auth ============ */
async function handleSession(session){
  if(!session){ showLogin(); return; }
  const u = session.user;
  const meta = u.user_metadata || {};
  if(meta.company_name !== COMPANY){ await sb.auth.signOut(); showLogin('Usuário sem acesso à NL Diagnostica.'); return; }
  ME = { id:u.id, email:u.email, full_name:meta.full_name||u.email, role:meta.role||'visualizacao' };
  isAdmin = ME.role === 'admin';
  showApp();
}
function showLogin(msg){ $('#login').classList.remove('hidden'); $('#app').classList.add('hidden'); if(msg) $('#loginErr').textContent=msg; }
function showApp(){
  $('#login').classList.add('hidden'); $('#app').classList.remove('hidden');
  const nm = ME.full_name || ME.email || 'Usuário';
  const initials = nm.trim().split(/\s+/).map(w=>w[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2) || 'NL';
  $('#userPill').textContent = `${nm} · ${isAdmin?'Admin':'Visualização'}`;

  if($('#userRole')) $('#userRole').textContent = isAdmin?'Administrador':'Visualização';

  if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
  switchView('editais');
}

/* ============ EDITAIS ============ */
async function loadStats(){
  const { data, error } = await sb.rpc('nl_stats');
  if(error){ console.error(error); return; }
  const s = data || {};
  // [rótulo, chave do contador, classe de cor, status p/ filtrar ('' = todos, null = não filtra)]
  const items = [
    ['Sugeridos p/ aceitar','sugerido_aceitar','s-aceitar','sugerido_aceitar'],
    ['Sugeridos p/ recusar','sugerido_recusar','s-recusar','sugerido_recusar'],
    ['Para analisar','analisando','s-analisar','analisando'],
    ['Aceitos','aceitos','s-aceitos','aceito'],
    ['Recusados','recusados','s-recusados','recusado'],
    ['Pend. sync Effecti','pendentes_sync','s-neutro',null],
    ['Total','total','s-neutro','']
  ];
  const cur = $('#fStatus').value;
  $('#statCards').innerHTML = items.map(([l,k,cls,flt])=>{
    const clickable = flt!==null;
    const active = clickable && flt===cur;
    return `<div class="stat ${cls}${clickable?' clickable':''}${active?' active':''}"${clickable?` data-filter="${flt}"`:''}>`
      + `<div class="n">${s[k]??0}</div><div class="l">${l}</div></div>`;
  }).join('');
  $('#statCards').querySelectorAll('.stat.clickable').forEach(c=> c.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
    $('#fStatus').value = c.dataset.filter; page = 0; loadStats(); loadEditais();
  }));
}
async function loadEditais(){
  const params = {
    p_status: $('#fStatus').value || null,
    p_uf: ($('#fUf').value||'').trim().toUpperCase() || null,
    p_search: ($('#fSearch').value||'').trim() || null,
    p_batch: null, p_limit: PAGE_SIZE, p_offset: page*PAGE_SIZE
  };
  const { data, error } = await sb.rpc('nl_dashboard_editais', params);
  if(error){ $('#editaisTable').innerHTML = `<div class="empty">Erro: ${esc(error.message)}</div>`; return; }
  const rows = data||[];
  totalCount = rows.length ? Number(rows[0].total_count) : 0;
  if(!rows.length){ $('#editaisTable').innerHTML = `<div class="empty">Nenhum edital encontrado.</div>`; }
  else {
    $('#editaisTable').innerHTML = `<table><thead><tr>
      <th>Nº edital</th><th>Órgão</th><th>UF</th><th>Data licitação</th><th>Modo</th><th>Score</th><th>Status</th><th>Links</th><th></th>
    </tr></thead><tbody>${rows.map(rowHtml).join('')}</tbody></table>`;
    bindRowActions(rows);
  }
  const totalPages = Math.max(1, Math.ceil(totalCount/PAGE_SIZE));
  $('#pageInfo').textContent = `Página ${page+1} de ${totalPages} · ${totalCount} editais`;
  $('#prevPage').disabled = page<=0; $('#nextPage').disabled = page+1>=totalPages;
}
function statusTag(st){
  const map={novo:['novo','Novo'],analisando:['analisando','Analisando'],sugerido_aceitar:['sug_a','Sug. aceitar'],sugerido_recusar:['sug_r','Sug. recusar'],aceito:['aceito','Aceito'],recusado:['recusado','Recusado']};
  const [c,l]=map[st]||['','—']; return `<span class="tag ${c}">${l}</span>`;
}
function rowHtml(r){
  const score = Math.round((r.score_match||0)*100);
  const links = `${r.url_edital?`<a class="pill-link" href="${esc(r.url_edital)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">edital ↗</a>`:''}${r.url_portal&&r.url_portal!==r.url_edital?` · <a class="pill-link" href="${esc(r.url_portal)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">portal ↗</a>`:''}${r.portal_nome?`<div class="badge">${esc(r.portal_nome)}</div>`:''}`;
  const decided = r.status==='aceito'||r.status==='recusado';
  const acts = decided ? `<button class="btn-ghost" data-act="view" data-id="${r.id}">ver</button>` :
    `<div class="row-actions">
       <button class="btn-ghost" data-act="view" data-id="${r.id}">ver</button>
       <button class="btn-ok" data-act="accept" data-id="${r.id}" data-lic="${r.id_licitacao||''}">aceitar</button>
       <button class="btn-no" data-act="reject" data-id="${r.id}" data-lic="${r.id_licitacao||''}">recusar</button>
     </div>`;
  return `<tr>
    <td><strong>${esc(r.numero_edital||'—')}</strong><div class="modo">${txt(r.modalidade)}</div></td>
    <td>${txt(r.orgao)||'—'}<div class="modo">${txt((r.objeto||'').slice(0,140)).slice(0,70)}${stripTags(r.objeto).length>70?'…':''}</div></td>
    <td>${esc(r.uf||'—')}</td>
    <td>${fmtDate(r.data_abertura)}</td>
    <td><span class="modo">${esc(r.modo_participacao||'—')}</span><div class="badge">${r.itens_participa}/${r.itens_total} itens</div></td>
    <td><div class="score-bar"><i style="width:${score}%"></i></div><span class="modo">${score}%</span></td>
    <td>${statusTag(r.status)}</td>
    <td>${links}</td>
    <td>${acts}</td>
  </tr>`;
}
function bindRowActions(rows){
  document.querySelectorAll('#editaisTable [data-act]').forEach(b=>{
    b.addEventListener('click', ()=>{
      const id=b.dataset.id;
      if(b.dataset.act==='view') return openEdital(id);
      if(b.dataset.act==='accept') return decide(id, b.dataset.lic, 'aceitar');
      if(b.dataset.act==='reject') return openRejectModal(id, b.dataset.lic);
    });
  });
}
$('#btnFilter').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ page=0; loadEditais(); });
$('#prevPage').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if(page>0){page--; loadEditais();} });
$('#nextPage').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ page++; loadEditais(); });
$('#btnPull').addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
  $('#btnPull').disabled=true; $('#btnPull').textContent='Buscando...';
  try{ await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-effecti-pull`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:'{}'}); toast('Busca disparada. Os novos editais aparecerão em instantes.'); }
  catch(e){ toast('Falha ao disparar busca: '+e.message); }
  setTimeout(()=>{ $('#btnPull').disabled=false; $('#btnPull').textContent='↻ Buscar Effecti'; loadStats(); loadEditais(); }, 4000);
});
$('#btnRematch').addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
  if(!await confirmDialog('Reprocessar as análises dos editais com o catálogo atual? Editais já aceitos/recusados não são alterados.',{okText:'Reprocessar',danger:false})) return;
  const btn=$('#btnRematch'); btn.disabled=true; const old=btn.textContent; btn.textContent='Reprocessando...';
  try{
    const { data, error } = await sb.rpc('nl_rematch_all', { p_only_pending:true });
    if(error) throw error;
    toast(`Reprocessados ${data?.reprocessados??0} editais.`,'success');
    loadStats(); loadEditais();
  }catch(e){ toast('Erro ao reprocessar: '+e.message,'error'); }
  finally{ btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent=old; }
});

/* ---- decision ---- */
async function decide(editalId, idLic, acao, motivo, motivoEffecti){
  const { data, error } = await sb.rpc('nl_record_decision', {
    p_edital_id: editalId, p_acao: acao, p_motivo: motivo||null,
    p_motivo_effecti: motivoEffecti||null, p_origem:'humano'
  });
  if(error){ toast('Erro ao registrar decisão: '+error.message,'error'); return; }
  const lic = idLic || (data && data.id_licitacao);
  if(lic){
    try{
      await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-effecti-sync`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
        body:JSON.stringify({ idLicitacao:Number(lic), acao, motivo:motivo||'', motivoEffecti:motivoEffecti||'OUTROS' })});
    }catch(e){ toast('Decisão salva, mas falhou sincronizar com a Effecti: '+e.message); }
  }
  closeModal(); toast(acao==='aceitar'?'Edital aceito (favoritado na Effecti).':'Edital recusado.');
  loadStats(); loadEditais();
}
function openRejectModal(editalId, idLic){
  openModal(`<header><strong>Recusar edital</strong><button class="close">×</button></header><div class="body">
    <label class="muted">Motivo (Effecti)</label>
    <select id="rjMotivo">${MOTIVOS_EFFECTI.map(m=>`<option value="${m}">${m.replace(/_/g,' ')}</option>`).join('')}</select>
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Observação (opcional)</label>
    <textarea id="rjObs" rows="3" placeholder="Detalhe o motivo..."></textarea>
    <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
      <button class="btn-ghost" id="rjCancel">Cancelar</button>
      <button class="btn-no" id="rjConfirm">Confirmar recusa</button>
    </div></div>`);
  $('#rjCancel').onclick=closeModal;
  $('#rjConfirm').onclick=()=> decide(editalId, idLic, 'recusar', $('#rjObs').value.trim(), $('#rjMotivo').value);
}

/* ---- edital detail ---- */
async function openEdital(id){
  const { data, error } = await sb.rpc('nl_get_edital', { p_edital_id:id });
  if(error){ toast('Erro: '+error.message,'error'); return; }
  const e = data.edital, items = data.itens||[];
  const decided = e.status==='aceito'||e.status==='recusado';
  // valor estimado: usa o do edital ou soma os itens (valor_total ou qtd × unitário)
  let valorEst = Number(e.valor_total_estimado)||0;
  if(valorEst<=0){ valorEst = items.reduce((s,it)=> s + (Number(it.valor_total)|| (Number(it.valor_unitario)||0)*(Number(it.quantidade)||0)), 0); }
  // group items by lote
  const lotes = {};
  items.forEach(it=>{ const k=it.lote||'—'; (lotes[k]=lotes[k]||[]).push(it); });
  const loteHtml = Object.entries(lotes).map(([lote,its])=>{
    const all = its.every(i=>i.participa), some = its.some(i=>i.participa);
    const cov = lote==='—'?'':`<div class="badge" style="margin-bottom:6px">Lote ${esc(lote)} — ${all?'fornecível 100%':some?'parcial':'fora de escopo'}</div>`;
    const rows = its.map(it=>`<tr>
      <td>${esc(it.item_num??'')}</td>
      <td>${txt((it.produto_licitado||'').slice(0,400)).slice(0,160)}</td>
      <td>${it.quantidade??''} ${esc(it.unidade||'')}</td>
      <td>${it.catalogo_descricao?`<span class="tag sug_a">${txt(it.catalogo_descricao)}</span>`:'<span class="muted">—</span>'}</td>
      <td>${Math.round((it.match_score||0)*100)}%</td>
      <td>${it.participa?'<span class="tag sug_a">sim</span>':'<span class="tag sug_r">não</span>'}
          ${!decided?`<button class="btn-ghost" style="padding:2px 6px;font-size:11px" data-toggle="${it.id}" data-cur="${it.participa?1:0}">⇄</button>`:''}</td>
    </tr>`).join('');
    return `${cov}<table style="margin-bottom:14px"><thead><tr><th>Item</th><th>Produto licitado</th><th>Qtd</th><th>Catálogo</th><th>Match</th><th>Participa</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`;
  }).join('');
  openModal(`<header><strong>Edital ${esc(e.numero_edital||'')}</strong> ${statusTag(e.status)}<button class="close">×</button></header>
   <div class="body">
    <div class="kv">
      <div><div class="k">Órgão</div><div class="v">${txt(e.orgao)||'—'}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">UF</div><div class="v">${esc(e.uf||'—')}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Modalidade</div><div class="v">${txt(e.modalidade)||'—'}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Data da licitação</div><div class="v">${fmtDate(e.data_abertura)}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Valor estimado</div><div class="v">${fmtMoney(valorEst)}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Modo sugerido</div><div class="v">${esc(e.modo_participacao||'—')} (score ${Math.round((e.score_match||0)*100)}%)</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Portal</div><div class="v">${esc(e.portal_nome||'—')}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Links</div><div class="v">${e.url_edital?`<a href="${esc(e.url_edital)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">edital ↗</a>`:'—'}</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-bottom:12px"><div class="k muted">Objeto</div>${txt(e.objeto)||'—'}</div>
    ${e.justificativa_ia?`<div class="badge" style="margin-bottom:12px">IA: ${txt(e.justificativa_ia)}</div>`:''}
    <h3 style="margin:6px 0">Itens / lotes</h3>
    ${items.length?loteHtml:'<div class="empty">Sem itens.</div>'}
    ${!decided?`<div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:10px">
      <button class="btn-no" id="edReject">Recusar</button>
      <button class="btn-ok" id="edAccept">Aceitar</button></div>`:''}
   </div>`);
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-toggle]').forEach(b=> b.onclick=async()=>{
    await sb.rpc('nl_set_item_participation',{p_item_id:b.dataset.toggle,p_participa:b.dataset.cur!=='1'});
    openEdital(id);
  });
  if(!decided){
    $('#edAccept').onclick=()=> decide(id, e.id_licitacao, 'aceitar');
    $('#edReject').onclick=()=> openRejectModal(id, e.id_licitacao);
  }
}

/* ============ GESTAO (KANBAN) ============ */
const BOARD_STAGES = [
  ['qualificado',         'Qualificado',            '#2563eb'],
  ['documentacao',        'Documentação',           '#7c3aed'],
  ['proposta_elaboracao', 'Proposta em elaboração', '#d97706'],
  ['proposta_enviada',    'Proposta enviada',       '#0891b2'],
  ['em_disputa',          'Em disputa / Sessão',    '#f7941e'],
  ['ganhou',              'Ganhou',                 '#16a34a'],
  ['perdeu',              'Perdeu',                 '#dc2626'],
];
const PRIO_LABEL = { alta:'Alta', media:'Média', baixa:'Baixa' };
let boardRows = [];

async function loadBoard(){
  const params = {
    p_uf: ($('#bUf').value||'').trim().toUpperCase() || null,
    p_search: ($('#bSearch').value||'').trim() || null, p_stage: null
  };
  const { data, error } = await sb.rpc('nl_board_editais', params);
  if(error){ $('#board').innerHTML = `<div class="empty">Erro: ${esc(error.message)}</div>`; return; }
  boardRows = data || [];
  $('#boardEmpty').classList.toggle('hidden', boardRows.length>0);
  renderBoard();
}
function renderBoard(){
  const byStage = {}; BOARD_STAGES.forEach(([k])=> byStage[k]=[]);
  boardRows.forEach(r=>{ const k=byStage[r.kanban_stage]?r.kanban_stage:'qualificado'; byStage[k].push(r); });
  $('#board').innerHTML = BOARD_STAGES.map(([key,label,color])=>{
    const cards = byStage[key];
    return `<div class="b-col" data-stage="${key}">
      <div class="b-col-head"><span class="dot" style="background:${color}"></span><span class="t">${esc(label)}</span><span class="c">${cards.length}</span></div>
      <div class="b-col-body" data-stage="${key}">${cards.map(boardCardHtml).join('')||'<div class="muted" style="font-size:11.5px;text-align:center;padding:10px 0">—</div>'}</div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  bindBoard();
  if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
}
function boardCardHtml(r){
  const prio = r.gestao_prioridade||'media';
  let prazoHtml='';
  if(r.gestao_prazo){
    const d=new Date(r.gestao_prazo+'T00:00:00'); const late=d < new Date(new Date().toDateString());
    prazoHtml=`<span class="bc-prazo ${late?'late':''}"><i data-lucide="calendar"></i>${fmtDate(r.gestao_prazo)}</span>`;
  }
  const resp = r.gestao_responsavel?`<span class="bc-resp"><i data-lucide="user"></i>${esc(r.gestao_responsavel)}</span>`:'';
  const val = Number(r.gestao_valor_proposta||r.valor_total_estimado)||0;
  return `<div class="b-card prio-${prio}" draggable="true" data-id="${r.id}" data-stage="${r.kanban_stage}">
    <div class="bc-top"><span class="bc-num">${esc(r.numero_edital||'—')}</span><span class="prio-pill ${prio}" style="margin-left:auto">${PRIO_LABEL[prio]}</span></div>
    <div class="bc-org">${txt(r.orgao)||'—'}${r.uf?` · ${esc(r.uf)}`:''}</div>
    <div class="bc-meta">${prazoHtml}${val>0?`<span class="badge">${fmtMoney(val)}</span>`:''}${resp}</div>
  </div>`;
}
function bindBoard(){
  let dragId=null;
  document.querySelectorAll('#board .b-card').forEach(card=>{
    card.addEventListener('click', ()=> openBoardCard(card.dataset.id));
    card.addEventListener('dragstart', e=>{ dragId=card.dataset.id; card.classList.add('dragging'); e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed='move'; });
    card.addEventListener('dragend', ()=>{ card.classList.remove('dragging'); document.querySelectorAll('#board .b-col').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('drag-over')); });
  });
  document.querySelectorAll('#board .b-col').forEach(col=>{
    col.addEventListener('dragover', e=>{ e.preventDefault(); col.classList.add('drag-over'); });
    col.addEventListener('dragleave', ()=> col.classList.remove('drag-over'));
    col.addEventListener('drop', e=>{ e.preventDefault(); col.classList.remove('drag-over');
      const stage=col.dataset.stage; if(dragId) changeStage(dragId, stage); dragId=null; });
  });
}
async function changeStage(id, stage){
  const row = boardRows.find(r=> r.id===id);
  if(!row || row.kanban_stage===stage) return;
  const prev = row.kanban_stage; row.kanban_stage = stage; renderBoard();
  const { error } = await sb.rpc('nl_update_gestao', { p_edital_id:id, p_stage:stage });
  if(error){ row.kanban_stage = prev; renderBoard(); toast('Erro ao mover edital: '+error.message,'error'); }
}
async function openBoardCard(id){
  const { data, error } = await sb.rpc('nl_get_edital', { p_edital_id:id });
  if(error){ toast('Erro: '+error.message,'error'); return; }
  const e = data.edital;
  const stageOpts = BOARD_STAGES.map(([k,l])=>`<option value="${k}" ${e.kanban_stage===k?'selected':''}>${esc(l)}</option>`).join('');
  const prioOpts = ['alta','media','baixa'].map(p=>`<option value="${p}" ${(e.gestao_prioridade||'media')===p?'selected':''}>${PRIO_LABEL[p]}</option>`).join('');
  openModal(`<header><strong>Gerir edital ${esc(e.numero_edital||'')}</strong><button class="close">×</button></header>
   <div class="body">
    <div class="kv">
      <div><div class="k">Órgão</div><div class="v">${txt(e.orgao)||'—'}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">UF</div><div class="v">${esc(e.uf||'—')}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Data da licitação</div><div class="v">${fmtDate(e.data_abertura)}</div></div>
      <div><div class="k">Links</div><div class="v">${e.url_edital?`<a href="${esc(e.url_edital)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">edital ↗</a>`:'—'}</div></div>
    </div>
    ${e.objeto?`<div style="margin-bottom:14px"><div class="k muted">Objeto</div>${txt((e.objeto||'').slice(0,500))}</div>`:''}
    <h3 style="margin:6px 0 10px">Acompanhamento</h3>
    <div class="kv" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(180px,1fr))">
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Etapa</label><select id="gStage">${stageOpts}</select></div>
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Prioridade</label><select id="gPrio">${prioOpts}</select></div>
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Responsável</label><input id="gResp" value="${esc(e.gestao_responsavel||'')}" placeholder="Nome" /></div>
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Prazo da proposta</label><input id="gPrazo" type="date" value="${esc(e.gestao_prazo||'')}" /></div>
      <div style="background:transparent;border:none;padding:0"><label class="muted">Valor da proposta (R$)</label><input id="gValor" type="number" step="0.01" min="0" value="${e.gestao_valor_proposta??''}" placeholder="0,00" /></div>
    </div>
    <label class="muted" style="display:block;margin-top:6px">Observações</label>
    <textarea id="gObs" rows="3" placeholder="Anotações de andamento...">${esc(e.gestao_observacoes||'')}</textarea>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-top:16px">

$('#btnAddCat').addEventListener('click', ()=> openCatModal(null));

    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Palavras-chave (separadas por vírgula)</label>
    <input id="cK" value="${esc((c.palavras_chave||[]).join(', '))}" />

  </div>`);
  $('#cCancel').onclick=closeModal;

    const split=s=>s.split(',').map(x=>x.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    const { error } = await sb.rpc('nl_admin_upsert_catalogo',{
      p_id:c.id||null, p_tipo:$('#cT').value, p_linha:$('#cL').value.trim(), p_descricao:$('#cD').value.trim(),

/* ============ DOCUMENTOS (RAG) ============ */
let docsBusy=false;
function setDocsBusy(busy){
  docsBusy=busy;
  ['#btnReindexAll','#btnUploadDoc','#btnAddDoc'].forEach(s=>{ const b=$(s); if(b) b.disabled=busy; });
  document.querySelectorAll('#docTable [data-reindex],#docTable [data-del]').forEach(b=> b.disabled=busy);
}
async function loadDocs(){
  docsBusy=false;
  try{
    const r = await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-docs`); const j = await safeJson(r);
    const docs = (j && (j.docs || (Array.isArray(j)?j:null))) || [];
    const rows=docs.map(d=>`<tr><td><strong>${esc(d.title||d.file_id)}</strong><div class="modo">${esc(d.file_id)}</div></td>
      <td>${esc(d.code||'—')}</td><td>${d.chunk_count||0}</td><td>${fmtDate(d.last_indexed_at)}</td>
      <td class="row-actions"><button class="btn-ghost" data-reindex="${esc(d.file_id)}">reprocessar</button>
      <button class="btn-no" data-del="${esc(d.file_id)}">excluir</button></td></tr>`).join('');
    $('#docTable').innerHTML = rows?`<table><thead><tr><th>Documento</th><th>Código</th><th>Chunks</th><th>Indexado</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>${rows}</tbody></table>`:'<div class="empty">Nenhum documento.</div>';
    document.querySelectorAll('#docTable [data-del]').forEach(b=> b.onclick=async()=>{ if(await confirmDialog('Excluir este documento do RAG?',{okText:'Excluir'})){ setDocsBusy(true); try{ await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-doc-delete`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({file_id:b.dataset.del})}); toast('Documento excluído.','success'); }catch(e){ toast('Erro: '+e.message,'error'); } setTimeout(loadDocs,800); }});
    document.querySelectorAll('#docTable [data-reindex]').forEach(b=> b.onclick=async()=>{ if(docsBusy) return; setDocsBusy(true); b.textContent='processando…'; try{ await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-reindex`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify({file_id:b.dataset.reindex})}); toast('Reprocessamento disparado.','success'); setTimeout(loadDocs,2000);}catch(e){ toast('Erro: '+e.message,'error'); setDocsBusy(false); b.textContent='reprocessar'; }});
  }catch(e){ $('#docTable').innerHTML=`<div class="empty">RAG indisponível: ${esc(e.message)}</div>`; }
}
/* enviar arquivo real (upload unitário; substitui se mesmo nome) */
$('#btnUploadDoc').addEventListener('click', ()=> $('#docFileInput').click());
$('#docFileInput').addEventListener('change', async (e)=>{
  const file=e.target.files[0]; e.target.value=''; if(!file) return;
  if(docsBusy) return;
  setDocsBusy(true);
  toast(`Enviando "${file.name}"…`,'info');
  try{
    const fd=new FormData(); fd.append('data', file, file.name);
    const r=await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-upload`,{method:'POST',body:fd});
    if(!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+r.status);
    toast('Arquivo enviado e indexado.','success'); setTimeout(loadDocs,1500);
  }catch(err){ toast('Erro no upload: '+err.message,'error'); setDocsBusy(false); }
});
/* reprocessar a pasta inteira do Drive */
$('#btnReindexAll').addEventListener('click', async ()=>{
  if(docsBusy) return;
  if(!await confirmDialog('Reprocessar TODA a pasta do Google Drive? Isso pode levar alguns minutos.',{okText:'Reprocessar',danger:false})) return;
  setDocsBusy(true);
  try{ await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-reindex`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:'{}'}); toast('Reprocessamento da pasta disparado.','success'); setTimeout(loadDocs,2500);}catch(e){ toast('Erro: '+e.message,'error'); setDocsBusy(false); }
});
$('#btnAddDoc').addEventListener('click', ()=>{
  openModal(`<header><strong>Adicionar documento</strong><button class="close">×</button></header><div class="body">
    <label class="muted">ID/código do arquivo</label><input id="dId" placeholder="MANUAL-COAG-01" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Título</label><input id="dTitle" />
    <label class="muted" style="margin-top:10px;display:block">Conteúdo (texto)</label><textarea id="dText" rows="8" placeholder="Cole aqui o texto do documento..."></textarea>
    <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end">
      <button class="btn-ghost" id="dCancel">Cancelar</button><button class="btn-pri" id="dSave">Indexar</button></div>
  </div>`);
  $('#dCancel').onclick=closeModal;
  $('#dSave').onclick=async()=>{
    const file_id=$('#dId').value.trim(); if(!file_id){toast('Informe o ID');return;}
    $('#dSave').disabled=true;
    try{ await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-upsert`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body:JSON.stringify({file_id,title:$('#dTitle').value.trim()||file_id,code:file_id,content_text:$('#dText').value})});
      closeModal(); loadDocs(); toast('Documento enviado para indexação.');
    }catch(e){ toast('Erro: '+e.message,'error'); $('#dSave').disabled=false; }
  };
});

/* ============ CHAT (widget flutuante) ============ */
const VIEW_LABELS = { editais:'Buscar editais', gestao:'Gerenciar editais', catalogo:'Catálogo', documentos:'Documentos', usuarios:'Usuários' };
function pageContextLabel(){ return VIEW_LABELS[currentView] || 'Buscar editais'; }
// ações rápidas por página (texto enviado ao agente quando clicado)
const QUICK_ACTIONS = {
  editais: [
    ['list','Listar editais novos','Liste os editais novos para eu analisar.'],
    ['sparkles','Sugeridos para aceitar','Quais editais estão sugeridos para aceitar e por quê?'],
    ['help-circle','Esse edital faz sentido?','Me ajude a avaliar se vale a pena participar dos editais em aberto.'],
  ],
  gestao: [
    ['gavel','O que está em disputa?','Quais editais aceitos estão na etapa "em disputa"?'],
    ['alarm-clock','O que está atrasado?','Quais editais aceitos estão com prazo de proposta vencido ou próximo?'],
    ['bar-chart-3','Resumo do funil','Me dê um resumo de quantos editais estão em cada etapa do funil.'],
  ],
  catalogo: [
    ['package','Ver catálogo','Liste os produtos e serviços ativos do catálogo.'],
  ],
  documentos: [
    ['folder-open','Sobre os documentos','O que há na base de conhecimento que posso consultar?'],
  ],
  usuarios: [
    ['list','Editais novos','Liste os editais novos para eu analisar.'],
  ],
};
function chatEmptyHtml(){
  const acts = QUICK_ACTIONS[currentView] || QUICK_ACTIONS.editais;
  const intro = currentView==='gestao'
    ? 'Acompanhe os editais aceitos. Peça para mover de etapa, definir responsável ou prazo.'
    : 'Pergunte sobre os editais, peça análises ou registre decisões.';
  const btns = acts.map((a,i)=>`<button class="qa-btn" data-qa="${i}"><i data-lucide="${a[0]}"></i><span>${esc(a[1])}</span></button>`).join('');
  return `<div class="empty" style="padding:24px 20px">${esc(intro)}
    <div class="cp-quick"><div class="qa-title">Ações rápidas · ${esc(pageContextLabel())}</div>${btns}</div></div>`;
}
function renderChatEmpty(){
  $('#msgs').innerHTML = chatEmptyHtml();
  if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
  const acts = QUICK_ACTIONS[currentView] || QUICK_ACTIONS.editais;
  document.querySelectorAll('#msgs .qa-btn').forEach(b=> b.onclick=()=>{
    const a = acts[Number(b.dataset.qa)]; if(!a) return;
    $('#chatInput').value = a[2]; sendChat();
  });
}
function openChat(){
  $('#chatPanel').classList.remove('hidden'); $('#chatFab').classList.add('hidden');
  if($('#chatCtx')) $('#chatCtx').textContent = pageContextLabel();
  if($('#msgs').querySelector('.empty')) renderChatEmpty();
  if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
  if(!curSession) loadSessions();
  setTimeout(()=>{ const i=$('#chatInput'); if(i) i.focus(); $('#msgs').scrollTop=$('#msgs').scrollHeight; }, 50);
}
function closeChat(){ $('#chatPanel').classList.add('hidden'); $('#chatFab').classList.remove('hidden'); }
function toggleExpandChat(){
  const p=$('#chatPanel'); const exp=p.classList.toggle('expanded');
  const btn=$('#chatExpand');
  if(btn){ btn.title = exp?'Recolher':'Expandir'; btn.innerHTML = `<i data-lucide="${exp?'minimize-2':'maximize-2'}"></i>`; }
  if(window.lucide) lucide.createIcons();
  $('#msgs').scrollTop=$('#msgs').scrollHeight;
}
$('#chatFab').addEventListener('click', openChat);
$('#chatClose').addEventListener('click', closeChat);
$('#chatExpand').addEventListener('click', toggleExpandChat);
$('#chatHistoryBtn').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ const s=$('#chatSessions'); s.classList.toggle('hidden'); if(!s.classList.contains('hidden')) loadSessions(); });

async function loadSessions(){
  if(!ME) return;
  try{
    const r=await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-sessions?userId=${encodeURIComponent(ME.id)}`); const arr=await safeJson(r);
    const list=Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[];
    $('#sessionList').innerHTML = list.map(s=>`<div class="s${s.session_id===curSession?' active':''}" data-s="${esc(s.session_id)}">${esc((stripCtx(s.titulo)||'Conversa').slice(0,40))}</div>`).join('') || '<div class="muted" style="padding:8px">Sem conversas</div>';
    document.querySelectorAll('#sessionList .s').forEach(d=> d.onclick=()=>{ openSession(d.dataset.s); $('#chatSessions').classList.add('hidden'); });
  }catch(e){ $('#sessionList').innerHTML=`<div class="muted" style="padding:8px">Indisponível</div>`; }
}
function newSessionId(){ return 'sess-'+Date.now()+'-'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8); }
$('#newChat').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ curSession=newSessionId(); renderChatEmpty(); $('#chatSessions').classList.add('hidden'); loadSessions(); });
async function openSession(id){
  curSession=id; loadSessions();
  try{
    const r=await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-history?sessionId=${encodeURIComponent(id)}&userId=${encodeURIComponent(ME.id)}`); const arr=await safeJson(r);
    const msgs=(Array.isArray(arr)?arr:[]).map(m=>m.message).filter(Boolean);
    $('#msgs').innerHTML = msgs.map(m=>{
      const type=m.type==='human'?'u':'a';
      const c=stripCtx(m.content);
      return `<div class="msg ${type}">${type==='a'?mdRender(c):esc(c)}</div>`;
    }).join('') || '<div class="empty">Conversa vazia.</div>';
    $('#msgs').scrollTop=$('#msgs').scrollHeight;
  }catch(e){ /* noop */ }
}
// recarrega a tela atual para o usuário VER as ações que o agente executou
function refreshCurrentView(){
  if(currentView==='editais'){ loadStats(); loadEditais(); }
  else if(currentView==='gestao'){ loadBoard(); }
}
async function sendChat(){
  const txt=$('#chatInput').value.trim(); if(!txt) return;
  if(!curSession) curSession=newSessionId();
  if($('#msgs').querySelector('.empty')) $('#msgs').innerHTML='';
  $('#msgs').appendChild(el('div','msg u',esc(txt))); $('#chatInput').value=''; $('#msgs').scrollTop=$('#msgs').scrollHeight;
  const thinking=el('div','msg a','…'); $('#msgs').appendChild(thinking); $('#msgs').scrollTop=$('#msgs').scrollHeight;
  // injeta a página atual para o agente considerar o contexto (não é exibido ao usuário)
  const message=`[PÁGINA: ${pageContextLabel()}] ${txt}`;
  try{
    const r=await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-AgentRag`,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},
      body:JSON.stringify({sessionId:curSession,userId:ME.id,userName:ME.full_name,message})});
    const j=await safeJson(r); thinking.innerHTML=mdRender((j&&j.output)||'(sem resposta)');
    refreshCurrentView();
  }catch(e){ thinking.innerHTML='Erro: '+esc(e.message); }
  $('#msgs').scrollTop=$('#msgs').scrollHeight; loadSessions();
}
$('#sendChat').addEventListener('click', sendChat);
$('#chatInput').addEventListener('keydown', e=>{ if(e.key==='Enter'&&!e.shiftKey){ e.preventDefault(); sendChat(); }});
/* anexar arquivo À CONVERSA atual (indexado só nesta sessão) */
$('#chatAttach').addEventListener('click', ()=>{ if(!curSession) curSession=newSessionId(); $('#chatFileInput').click(); });
$('#chatFileInput').addEventListener('change', async (e)=>{
  const file=e.target.files[0]; e.target.value=''; if(!file) return;
  if(!curSession) curSession=newSessionId();
  if($('#msgs').querySelector('.empty')) $('#msgs').innerHTML='';
  const note=el('div','msg a',`📎 Indexando "${esc(file.name)}" nesta conversa…`); $('#msgs').appendChild(note); $('#msgs').scrollTop=$('#msgs').scrollHeight;
  try{
    const fd=new FormData(); fd.append('data', file, file.name); fd.append('session_id', curSession);
    const r=await fetch(`${CONFIG.N8N_BASE}/nldiag-rag-upload?sessionId=${encodeURIComponent(curSession)}`,{method:'POST',body:fd});
    if(!r.ok) throw new Error('HTTP '+r.status);
    note.innerHTML=`📎 Arquivo "${esc(file.name)}" indexado nesta conversa. Já posso responder sobre ele.`;
  }catch(err){ note.innerHTML='Erro ao anexar: '+esc(err.message); }
  $('#msgs').scrollTop=$('#msgs').scrollHeight;
});

/* ============ modal + toast ============ */
function openModal(html){ const r=$('#modalRoot'); r.innerHTML=`<div class="modal-bg"><div class="modal">${html}</div></div>`; r.querySelector('.modal-bg').onclick=e=>{if(e.target.classList.contains('modal-bg'))closeModal();}; const c=r.querySelector('.close'); if(c)c.onclick=closeModal; }
function closeModal(){ $('#modalRoot').innerHTML=''; }
function toast(msg, type){
  type = type || 'info';
  const icon = type==='success' ? '✓' : type==='error' ? '!' : 'i';
  const t = el('div','toast '+type, `<span class="ti">${icon}</span><span class="tx">${esc(msg)}</span>`);
  $('#toastRoot').appendChild(t);
  requestAnimationFrame(()=> t.classList.add('show'));
  setTimeout(()=>{ t.classList.remove('show'); setTimeout(()=>t.remove(),300); }, 3500);
}
/* diálogo de confirmação in-app (substitui confirm() do navegador) */
function confirmDialog(message, opts){
  opts = opts || {};
  const okText = opts.okText || 'Confirmar';
  const cancelText = opts.cancelText || 'Cancelar';
  const danger = opts.danger !== false; // padrão: ação destrutiva
  return new Promise(resolve=>{
    openModal(`<div class="body">
      <div class="confirm-ico ${danger?'danger':'ask'}">${danger?'⚠':'?'}</div>
      <div class="confirm-msg">${esc(message)}</div>
      <div class="confirm-actions">
        <button class="btn-ghost" id="cfNo">${esc(cancelText)}</button>
        <button class="${danger?'btn-no':'btn-pri'}" id="cfYes">${esc(okText)}</button>
      </div>
    </div>`);
    $('#modalRoot .modal').classList.add('confirm');
    let done=false;
    const finish=v=>{ if(done)return; done=true; closeModal(); resolve(v); };
    $('#cfYes').onclick=()=>finish(true);
    $('#cfNo').onclick=()=>finish(false);
    const bg=$('#modalRoot .modal-bg'); if(bg) bg.onclick=e=>{ if(e.target.classList.contains('modal-bg')) finish(false); };
  });
}
</script>
